name: Emma B.
archetype_label: Manufacturing operations head · warmed by prior touch

signals.content: Promoted to Head of Operations 14 months ago; reports to MD.
Opened a third site (logistics hub) last quarter.
Replied to email #3 in your sequence 2 days ago: "interesting — talk Friday?"

top_pain: Bookkeeper re-keys supplier receipts late every month
ideal_close_line: Let me set up a 10-minute call with your accountant — we'll walk them through the Xero sync. Tuesday 11 or Thursday 2?

signals.content: Posted about opening a second location 6 months ago.

name: Tom K.

signals.content: Hired 8 engineers in the last 60 days.
